nasb.text: and said, ‘For this reason a man shall leave his father and mother and be joined to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh’?

esv.text: and said, ‘Therefore a man shall leave his father and his mother and hold fast to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh’?

ccb.text: ‘因此，人要离开父母，与妻子结合，二人成为一体。’

csbs.text: 并且说： ‘为这缘故，人将离开父母， 与妻子结合， 两个人就成为一体。’
